bugku

## 1.强网先锋辅助-强网杯

task_cha.py

### ![image-20260328170339164](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260328170339164.png)

代码：使用RSA加密 第一部分加密flag，输出c，e，n，第二段重新生成一个p，相同公钥指数，明文为32字符，用新的n对已知明文加密得到c，输出c，e，n

解题思路：题目已经给出n，但位数太大无法使用yafu分解，

关键：两段代码使用相同q，且已经知道两个n，有

```
n1=p1*q
n2=p2*q
```

所以通过计算

```
gcd(n1,n2)
```

可以得到q，

那么使用q分解n1,得到p1，就可以算出d，解密密文c1得到flag

代码参考

```
import math
from Crypto.Util.number import long_to_bytes
 
e=65537


q=math.gcd(n1,n2)
p1=n1//q
phi=(p1-1)*(q-1)
d=pow(e,-1,phi)
m=pow(c1,d,n1)
flag=long_to_bytes(m)
print(flag)
```

## 2.3-hafuhafu-网鼎杯

enc

![image-20260328174757321](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260328174757321.png)

文件给出RSA公钥，即得到

```

e=65537
```

及一个base64编码的密文c，使用随波逐流解码为乱码失败，故使用代码，

factor分解n得到

```


```

求phi，再得到d，解密cde'dao

参考代码

```
import base64
from Crypto.Util.number import *

e=65537


enc = """DTlEiAKLE24m19es4TBWl4Uo2MvmQMEYqWBCFggWJlJSjCwl3fT9322ytgudiQW2raDh53e6t2ed
ygpFOP+MsAPXlU469rlmVng5JyDl0CF0ypevnaM5i+CvNT2mBoDadIYnPBVGMtj9HVVPDpMIgv5b
F9N5ddQS7JB21oDdQBdDLTkKvcSqegtjNFv04R8+yrqOMZYpzdCRRw0j/MMt2JefC6z36mjrTL85
A9EKlwKg5ydW7qELycfjBvzB/cwJ7mJ2I0xVPToa3sSLNDyddFttATwU6wmCa4XaWpTwVR/PfET2
FRj0p+8UwYSDdlLLh6gRUVURpT+2jc9zx/rhOw=="""
phi=(p-1)*(q-1)
d=pow(e,-1,phi)
c1=base64.b64decode(enc)
c=bytes_to_long(c1)
m=pow(c,d,n)
flag=long_to_bytes(m)
print(flag)
```

## 3.3-track_hacke-网鼎杯

![image-20260329193340012](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260329193340012.png)

先查看http![image-20260329194503816](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260329194503816.png)

发现有但是解码无效，

```
eJwrLy/XTUksSQQADqgDLQ==
eJwDAAAAAAE=
```

继续查看tcp，在

![image-20260329194738569](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260329194738569.png)

中发现flag.txt

![image-20260329195511005](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260329195511005.png)

攻击者通过post参数c直接执行系统命令

```
核心:k=cometohackme&c=cat /flag.txt
```

```
k是检验参数，c是命令执行参数，直接传入系统命令cat /flag.txt，尝试读取服务器上的flag文件，eJxLy0lMrw6NTzPMS4n3TVWsBQAz4wXi为执行结果，是zlib压缩后的base64（开头通常为ejx），
```

所以解码解压后即获得flag

flag{U_f1nd_Me!}

参考代码

```
import base64
import zlib
data = """eJxLy0lMrw6NTzPMS4n3TVWsBQAz4wXi"""
m=base64.b64decode(data)
flag=zlib.decompress(m).decode()
print(flag)
```

## 4.3-Not_only_base-网鼎杯

题目提示：不止是base

![image-20260329202545121](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260329202545121.png)

```
MCJIJSGKP=ZZYXZXRMU=W3YZG3ZZ==G3HQHCUS==
```

且=为填充符，故在随波逐流中一键解码，

![image-20260329203234399](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260329203234399.png)

发现栅栏4时=全在后面

```
MZWGCZ33JYYHIXZQJZGHSX3CGRZUKMZSPU======
```

使用cyberchef

![image-20260329203919298](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260329203919298.png)

发现为base32解码得flag{N0t_0NLy_b4sE32}

## 5.这是什么编码-Xp0inCTF

encode.txt

```

```

一次

![image-20260329204525955](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260329204525955.png)

二次

![image-20260329204622351](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260329204622351.png)

用了很多base64和32编码。且交加

flag{8asE64_32_16_Fun1}

## 6.RSA1-HackINI

file.txt

![image-20260330212333924](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260330212333924.png)

关键：n位数比较小可以分解

使用yafu分解n，获得![image-20260330212433889](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260330212433889.png)

```
P19 = 9942874965373398689
P78 = 102411157768469768587484356311902427789461430190314198242306101223897141593967
```

接下来求phi，再求d，解码c

参考代码

```
from Crypto.Util.number import *
n=1018261336751023520497560395829454421245429586704872293236600679847605951423419167478189648109263
p=9942874965373398689
q=102411157768469768587484356311902427789461430190314198242306101223897141593967
phi=(p-1)*(q-1)
e=65537
d=pow(e,-1,phi)
c=713822463491939628949080236459794906441914407944768290378695739068636927695199214947719158013040
m=pow(c,d,n)
flag=long_to_bytes(m)
print(flag)
```

shellmates{U_5h0uld_U53_L4rg3_Numb3r5}

## 7.RSA2-HackINI

描述：![image-20260330213925921](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260330213925921.png)

大概意思就是n变大了，不能用分解的方法得出p和q了，但是有一个小指数

![image-20260330214125724](C:\Users\39769\AppData\Roaming\Typora\typora-user-images\image-20260330214125724.png)

所以关键在e=2，已知

``` 
c=m^e mod n
```

且当e很小的时候，e=2时

```
c=m^2 mod n
```

且题目已经提示不应该考虑分解n的情况，那么应该是m<√n的情况，模无效，尝试

已知

```
c=178578054113587665880573638525543971357824122622159505488720384368602953181166564534730680603152376825130794419393716164247143515361066971379409790862584250121
```

所以

```
m=math.isqrt(c)
```

参考代码

```
from Crypto.Util.number import *
import math

c=178578054113587665880573638525543971357824122622159505488720384368602953181166564534730680603152376825130794419393716164247143515361066971379409790862584250121
m=math.isqrt(c)
flag=long_to_bytes(m)
print(flag)
```

得到shellmates{4v0id_5m4ll_3xp0n3nt5}

解释：论为什么满足c=m^2<n,没有模折叠，可以直接开根

```
e=2
c=m^2 mod n
所以
m^2=k*n+c
如果m的平方比n还小，那么k只能为0，即m^2<n，此时模没有起作用
反之矛盾，
```

## 8.Unrecoverable-HackINI

描述：

```
In order to get rid of a special message and make it unrecoverable, I encrypted it using "randomly" shuffled characters
```

翻译：为了消除一条特殊信息并使其无法恢复，我用“随机”打乱的字符对其进行了加密

关键：随机

challenge.py

![image-20260331171838050](C:/Users/39769/AppData/Roaming/Typora/typora-user-images/image-20260331171838050.png)

代码：

```
chars = ascii_lowercase + digits 
把字母和数字拼在一起，形成字符表
重点：
random.seed(2**1337 - 1)
设置随机数生成器的种子，且种子固定，随机数固定
shuffled_chars=[i for i in chars]
把char转成列表
random.shuffle(shuffled_chars)
开始打乱
shuffled_chars = ''.join(shuffled_chars)
把打乱后的字符变成长字符串
```

```
for i in flag:
    if i.isalnum():
        enc += shuffled_chars[chars.index(i)]
    else:
        enc+=i
开始遍历flag按表替换，遇到不是字母或者数字则不变，最后打印出加密后的字符串 ctn44vmunc{3ghgsy_uto_coo2_gc_2asyoxg1ec}
```

按原本代码生成乱序表

参考代码：

```
import random 
from string import ascii_lowercase,digits

chars = ascii_lowercase + digits 

random.seed(2**1337 - 1)

shuffled_chars=list(chars)
random.shuffle(shuffled_chars)
print(''.join(shuffled_chars))
```

得到乱序表mr02n3ytwjl4vsd6qxcue5kh981gfoazipb7与前面的字符表相对应

![MVIMG_20260331_201205](C:/Users/39769/Downloads/MVIMG_20260331_201205.jpg)

最后得到shellmates{f1x1ng_th3_s33d_1s_d4ng3r10us}

## 9.neighbors-HackINI

chall：

```
N : 
e : 65537
C : 
```

challenge.py

![image-20260401205813597](C:/Users/39769/AppData/Roaming/Typora/typora-user-images/image-20260401205813597.png)

关键：

```
p = number.getPrime(2048)
q = next_prime(p)
```

可以知道pq相近，

但是看n位数不算大尝试分解

可以分解

得到

```


```

参考代码

```
import gmpy2
from Crypto.Util.number import long_to_bytes

e=65537




phi=(p-1)*(q-1)
d=gmpy2.invert(e, phi)
m=pow(c,d,n)
flag = long_to_bytes(m)
print(flag)
```

得到shellmates{F3RM47_H4S_Ju57_T0Ok_R$A_D0WN}

## 10.Night Coder-HackINI-2022

challenge.py

![image-20260401230418033](C:/Users/39769/AppData/Roaming/Typora/typora-user-images/image-20260401230418033.png)

该代码取运行时时间为随机种子，用这个种子打乱flag得到N_gs{aesD_he_3AtrsOLlh3ROT1sECRl0m}s

关键：得到种子即可再shuffle一次恢复flag，而种子与运行时间有关（年月日）

![image-20260401231019136](C:/Users/39769/AppData/Roaming/Typora/typora-user-images/image-20260401231019136.png)

代码中提示：一个周四凌晨，且注意该题是2022年的

所以直接遍历2022所有周四的凌晨0：00到6：00，做为随机种子，还原被shuffle打乱的密文，找到包含shellmates的正确flag

参考代码

```
import random
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
def seed_shuffler(my_list, seed):
    random.seed(seed)
    random.shuffle(my_list)
    return my_list

def inverse_seed_shuffler(shuffled, seed):
    n = len(shuffled)
    idx = list(range(n))
    idx = seed_shuffler(idx, seed)
    m = {idx[i]: i for i in range(n)}
    return [shuffled[m[i]] for i in range(n)]

c = "N_gs{aesD_he_3AtrsOLlh3ROT1sECRl0m}s"
c = [ch for ch in c]

start = datetime(2022, 1, 1)
cur = start + timedelta(days=(3 - start.weekday() + 7) % 7)

# 遍历 2022 所有周四
while cur.year == 2022:
    for hour in range(6):
        for minute in range(60):
            t = cur.replace(hour=hour, minute=minute).strftime('%Y%m%d%H%M')
            seed = int(t)
            f = inverse_seed_shuffler(c, seed)
            f = ''.join(f)

            if "shellmates" in f:
                print("时间：", cur.replace(hour=hour, minute=minute))
                print("flag：", f)
                exit()

    cur += timedelta(weeks=1)
```

得到

```
时间： 2022-05-26 02:13:00
flag： shellmates{N1ghT_C0D3Rs_ArE_LOOs3Rs}
```
